project_type: Single-file HTML app with inline JS/CSS - Danish electrical dimensioning tool
build_system: None - single HTML file, no build step
test_framework: Custom test runner in test-sld.js using Node.js assert module
verification_instructions: Run 'node test-sld.js' from /projects/sandbox/Claude and verify all 175 tests pass (currently 71 pass, 104 fail due to missing implementations)
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just Node.js available on the host
environment_constraints: Single HTML file architecture - all code must be added inline within the <script> tag. No external dependencies. Click-only UI (no text input fields). Trilingual support (da/en/fa).
contribution_requirements: All UI must be click-only (buttons, sliders, dropdowns - no text input). All labels trilingual (da/en/fa). All calculations must reference DS/HD 60364 clauses. Conservative rounding for safety-critical values (ceiling for danger, floor for capacity).
key_patterns: Module pattern: each module has a renderXxx() function returning HTML string. State stored in xxxState objects. Translations in T object (T.da/T.en/T.fa). Products in PRODUCTS object. Helper tx(da,en) for inline translations. _FA dictionary for Farsi lookups. sel-btn class for click buttons. result-box/card/card-title CSS classes.
directory_structure: Flat structure: el-dimensionering.html (7666 lines, the app), test-sld.js (2687 lines, tests). HTML structure: CSS -> <script> containing T translations (line 624), PRODUCTS data (line 1210), state objects, calculation functions, render functions, module dispatch (renderModule at line 2691).
